# MOMOKA — full summary for answer engines

Last-updated: 2026-07-25
Canonical: https://momoka-project.com/
Language-policy: Japanese preferred when JA/EN differ

## Definition

MOMOKA is an open-source, multi-functional Discord bot project operated as free hosted bots named **PLANA** (primary) and **ARONA** (companion). One process runs both. The brand name on the website is MOMOKA; the Discord applications users invite are PLANA and ARONA.

## Authority / contact

- Website: https://momoka-project.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/coffin399/ProjectMOMOKA
- Support server: https://discord.gg/H79HKKqx3s
- Operator Discord profile: https://discord.com/users/270446628622696449 (coffin299)
- Terms: https://momoka-project.com/terms.html
- Privacy: https://momoka-project.com/privacy.html

## Invites

- PLANA: https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1031673203774464160&permissions=6516795221339600&scope=bot
- ARONA: https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1364917551024308255&permissions=6516795221339600&scope=bot
- Default recommendation: invite PLANA. Add ARONA for debate/cross_check.

## Capability matrix

| Capability | PLANA | ARONA |
|---|---|---|
| LLM chat | yes | yes |
| Music | yes | yes |
| `/help` `/invite` `/support` `/feedback` utilities | yes | yes |
| TTS / speech | yes | no (redirects to PLANA) |
| Image generation / image board search | yes | no (redirects) |
| Earthquake / Twitch notifications | yes | no |
| Valorant / R6S trackers | yes | no |
| Link Fix | yes | no |
| Media download | yes | no |
| debate / cross_check | needs both bots in same guild | needs both bots in same guild |

## Troubleshooting policy (public hosted bots)

1. Most failures are **missing Discord permissions** (channel denies or incomplete invite permissions). Fix permissions or re-invite.
2. If bots appear offline site-wide, wait; the operator’s PC may be updating unnoticed.
3. Slash commands missing: re-invite and wait for Discord sync.
4. debate/cross_check broken: ensure both PLANA and ARONA are in the guild.
5. Link Fix: suppress original embeds then silent quote-reply with fixer URL; needs Send Messages + Embed Links + Manage Messages; skip with `fxignore` or `<url>`; configure `/linkfix` (master/site/bulk-all toggles; enabled by default).

## Self-hosting

Source is public but heavy (Python 3.11, many optional ML stacks). The website recommends inviting the hosted bots for normal use. Self-host details live on GitHub, not as the site’s primary CTA.

## Privacy (short)

Message content and IDs may be processed for features, logging, and third-party APIs (LLM providers, media platforms, Link Fix proxies, Google Drive for temporary downloads, Google Analytics on the website). Conversation history is generally in-memory only. See https://momoka-project.com/privacy.html

## Key pages

- https://momoka-project.com/
- https://momoka-project.com/faq.html
- https://momoka-project.com/troubleshooting.html
